quests.sentence: The engineer analyzes the system.
quests.activeSentence: The engineer analyzes the system.
quests.passiveSentence: The system is analyzed by the engineer.
quests.hint: The subject is performing the action.
quests.explanation: The subject 'engineer' is doing the action 'analyzes'.

quests.sentence: The data is conducted by the scientist.
quests.activeSentence: The scientist conducts the data.
quests.passiveSentence: The data is conducted by the scientist.
quests.hint: The action is being done TO the subject.
quests.explanation: The subject 'data' is receiving the action.

quests.sentence: The explorer builds the portal.
quests.activeSentence: The explorer builds the portal.
quests.passiveSentence: The portal is built by the explorer.
quests.hint: The subject is performing the action.
quests.explanation: The explorer is the one doing the building.

quests.sentence: The engine was discovered by the doctor.
quests.activeSentence: The doctor discovered the engine.
quests.passiveSentence: The engine was discovered by the doctor.
quests.explanation: Past passive uses 'was/were' + past participle.

quests.sentence: The pilot protects the network.
quests.activeSentence: The pilot protects the network.
quests.passiveSentence: The network is protected by the pilot.
quests.hint: The subject is performing the action.
quests.explanation: Active voice: Subject + Verb + Object.

quests.sentence: The signal is navigated by the architect.
quests.activeSentence: The architect navigates the signal.
quests.passiveSentence: The signal is navigated by the architect.
quests.hint: The action is being done TO the subject.
quests.explanation: The signal is the receiver of the action.

quests.sentence: The coder monitors the module.
quests.activeSentence: The coder monitors the module.
quests.passiveSentence: The module is monitored by the coder.
quests.hint: The subject is performing the action.
quests.explanation: Coder (Subject) -> monitors (Verb).

quests.sentence: The sequence was secured by the hero.
quests.activeSentence: The hero secured the sequence.
quests.passiveSentence: The sequence was secured by the hero.
quests.explanation: The 'by' phrase often indicates passive voice.

quests.sentence: The guardian optimizes the interface.
quests.activeSentence: The guardian optimizes the interface.
quests.passiveSentence: The interface is optimized by the guardian.
quests.hint: The subject is performing the action.
quests.explanation: Guardian is the actor.

quests.sentence: The core was executed by the researcher.
quests.activeSentence: The researcher executed the core.
quests.passiveSentence: The core was executed by the researcher.
quests.hint: The action is being done TO the subject.
quests.explanation: Passive voice uses auxiliary + past participle.

quests.sentence: The analyst activates the link.
quests.activeSentence: The analyst activates the link.
quests.passiveSentence: The link is activated by the analyst.
quests.hint: The subject is performing the action.
quests.explanation: Analyst is the doer.

quests.sentence: The matrix was decoded by the specialist.
quests.activeSentence: The specialist decoded the matrix.
quests.passiveSentence: The matrix was decoded by the specialist.
quests.explanation: The matrix is the passive subject.

quests.sentence: The expert scans the node.
quests.activeSentence: The expert scans the node.
quests.passiveSentence: The node is scanned by the expert.
quests.explanation: Standard Active: S-V-O.

quests.sentence: The relay was upgraded by the master.
quests.activeSentence: The master upgraded the relay.
quests.passiveSentence: The relay was upgraded by the master.
quests.explanation: Action is performed on the relay.

quests.sentence: The technician repairs the circuit.
quests.activeSentence: The technician repairs the circuit.
quests.passiveSentence: The circuit is repaired by the technician.
quests.explanation: The subject performs the repair.

quests.sentence: The satellite is being tracked by the station.
quests.activeSentence: The station is tracking the satellite.
quests.passiveSentence: The satellite is being tracked by the station.
quests.explanation: Present continuous passive uses 'am/is/are being' + V3.

quests.sentence: The team is developing a new prototype.
quests.activeSentence: The team is developing a new prototype.
quests.passiveSentence: A new prototype is being developed by the team.
quests.hint: The team is currently performing the action.
quests.explanation: Present continuous active: S + is/are + V-ing.

quests.sentence: The files were being uploaded by the server.
quests.activeSentence: The server was uploading the files.
quests.passiveSentence: The files were being uploaded by the server.
quests.explanation: Past continuous passive uses 'was/were being' + V3.

quests.sentence: The software has been updated by the developer.
quests.activeSentence: The developer has updated the software.
quests.passiveSentence: The software has been updated by the developer.
quests.explanation: Present perfect passive: has/have been + V3.

quests.sentence: The manager has approved the request.
quests.activeSentence: The manager has approved the request.
quests.passiveSentence: The request has been approved by the manager.
quests.hint: The manager performed the action already.
quests.explanation: Present perfect active: has/have + V3.

quests.sentence: The documents had been signed before the meeting.
quests.activeSentence: They had signed the documents before the meeting.
quests.passiveSentence: The documents had been signed before the meeting.
quests.explanation: Past perfect passive: had been + V3.

quests.sentence: The problem can be solved by a specialist.
quests.activeSentence: A specialist can solve the problem.
quests.passiveSentence: The problem can be solved by a specialist.
quests.explanation: Passive with modals: Modal + be + V3.

quests.sentence: Students must submit their assignments on time.
quests.activeSentence: Students must submit their assignments on time.
quests.passiveSentence: Assignments must be submitted on time by students.
quests.hint: The subject (students) must do the action.
quests.explanation: Active with modals: Modal + Base Verb.

quests.sentence: The report should be reviewed twice.
quests.activeSentence: You should review the report twice.
quests.passiveSentence: The report should be reviewed twice.
quests.explanation: Passive with modals: Modal + be + V3.

quests.sentence: The construction will have been completed by June.
quests.activeSentence: They will have completed the construction by June.
quests.passiveSentence: The construction will have been completed by June.
quests.explanation: Future perfect passive: will have been + V3.

quests.sentence: The company will have reached its goal soon.
quests.activeSentence: The company will have reached its goal soon.
quests.passiveSentence: The goal will have been reached by the company soon.
quests.hint: Future perfect action by the subject.
quests.explanation: Future perfect active: will have + V3.

quests.sentence: A solution is being sought by the committee.
quests.activeSentence: The committee is seeking a solution.
quests.passiveSentence: A solution is being sought by the committee.
quests.explanation: Present continuous passive.

quests.sentence: The mysterious signal was finally decoded.
quests.activeSentence: The experts finally decoded the mysterious signal.
quests.passiveSentence: The mysterious signal was finally decoded.
quests.hint: The receiver of the action is the subject.
quests.explanation: Passive voice with an omitted agent (no 'by' phrase).

quests.sentence: Several errors had been detected in the code.
quests.activeSentence: The debugger had detected several errors in the code.
quests.passiveSentence: Several errors had been detected in the code.
quests.explanation: Past perfect passive.

quests.sentence: The ancient civilization left behind massive ruins.
quests.activeSentence: The ancient civilization left behind massive ruins.
quests.passiveSentence: Massive ruins were left behind by the ancient civilization.
quests.explanation: Active voice: Subject (civilization) + Verb (left).
